assertions.assertion: Changes return types from IEnumerable<T> to IReadOnlyCollection<T>
assertions.rationale: Response shows the before/after with IEnumerable → IReadOnlyCollection change.

assertions.assertion: Shows using .ToList() or .ToArray() to convert query results
assertions.rationale: Response uses .ToListAsync() and mentions both .ToList() and .ToArray().

assertions.assertion: Adds CancellationToken parameter to the affected methods
assertions.rationale: All method signatures include `CancellationToken ct` parameter.

assertions.assertion: Mentions this applies to multiple interfaces (IResourceStore, etc.)
assertions.rationale: Response states it applies to IResourceStore, IClientStore, IPersistedGrantStore, IDeviceFlowStore, and others.
